name: Emily Lee
body: Ya know, it's like the Lord is wanting you to not just "post-it note" His providence and faithfulness and dependence on Him...but is really wanting you to engrave it in stone that He alone is all you need, He is faithful, He sustains, He provides, He comforts, and He gets all the glory. TRULY, you can testify that in your weakest, God is strongest. It just seems like He's wanting to solidify that into your lives. Man alive, it is absolutely miserable in the midst of it. The pain is real. The breakdowns are normal. But oh my word...how you'll come out the other end...that can't come any other way. ❤️
